## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy and next steps for Alex AI's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX refined content strategy, focusing on staffing topic cluster and proposing new recruiting efficiency cluster](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [80 potential topics identified through keyword research and competitive gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Team to select topics for approval, with focus on pain points and specific solutions Alex AI offers](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [Next steps include client review of proposed topics, CMS access, and preparing for first calibration article](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Prioritized staffing topic cluster based on client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Added new recruiting efficiency topic cluster](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Conducted keyword research and competitive gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Identified \~80 potential topics across various clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
      - [AI recruiting and interview automation](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
      - [Staffing firm operations](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
      - [Recruiting technology comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Recruiting efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
      - [Enterprise recruiting (lower priority)](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

### Keyword and Topic Review

  - [Focus on low-hanging fruit: high-intent, low-difficulty keywords](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Emphasis on specific use cases and features of Alex AI](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Key themes to address:](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
      - [Reducing "ghosting" in recruiting process](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
      - [Integrations with ATSs (e.g., Bullhorn, Avionte, Tracker)](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
      - [Increasing productivity: "same people, more placements"](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
      - [Automating busy work in recruiting process](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Content Calibration and Production

  - [Team to select initial topics for calibration article](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [Aim to produce calibration article by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Scale to 2-3 articles following week, then increase production](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Focus on pain points and specific solutions Alex AI offers](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)

### CMS Access and Publishing Process

  - [Client to provide Webflow access to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Client to record video of publishing process for team reference](https://fathom.video/share/z2L6-fEQhgNACi2QxKo_6yVVSgZQyF6t?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
